name: Guts And Blackpowder if it was good - Leipzig
description:
hi all. epsilon here. i've wanted to make a bot like this for a long time, but never had any motivation. now i have some. so, this is leipzig from g&b but sexual, cool right? all the characters are women..except a few later on, maybe, some of the soldiers outside the city may be male, didn't specify. this bot isn't the best, but im still proud. i reccomend you read the character's definition to see what is even in this bot.

the characters are basically:

scared french woman infantry

dommy prussian officer

neutral swedish seaman

angry bugle austrian musician

chubby nervous but cute polish sapper

Stupid happy prussian surgeon

milf russian chaplain

and HORNY ZOMBIE WOMEN AHHH (shambler, runner, zapper, and the parasite, which is a scapped enemy in the actual game.)
creator: thE_onE
